'''ây-s-b''' ('''yasaba''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monologue|monologue]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-s-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monologue|monologue]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-s-b
|-
! Lemma
| yasaba
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yasabithi|yasabithi]] || [[word:yasabiji|yasabiji]] || [[word:yasabishi|yasabishi]] || [[word:yasabi|yasabi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yasabuthuth|yasabuthuth]] || [[word:yasabujuj|yasabujuj]] || [[word:yasabushush|yasabushush]] || [[word:yasab|yasab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yasabuthu|yasabuthu]] || [[word:yasabuju|yasabuju]] || [[word:yasabushu|yasabushu]] || [[word:yasabu|yasabu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yasabufuth|yasabufuth]] || [[word:yasabufuj|yasabufuj]] || [[word:yasabufush|yasabufush]] || [[word:yasabuf|yasabuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yasabethe|yasabethe]] || [[word:yasabeje|yasabeje]] || [[word:yasabeshe|yasabeshe]] || [[word:yasabe|yasabe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yasabothoth|yasabothoth]] || [[word:yasabojoj|yasabojoj]] || [[word:yasaboshosh|yasaboshosh]] || [[word:yasab|yasab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yasabotho|yasabotho]] || [[word:yasabojo|yasabojo]] || [[word:yasabosho|yasabosho]] || [[word:yasabo|yasabo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yasabofoth|yasabofoth]] || [[word:yasabofoj|yasabofoj]] || [[word:yasabofosh|yasabofosh]] || [[word:yasabof|yasabof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yasabĂŠthĂŠ|yasabĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:yasabĂŠjĂŠ|yasabĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:yasabĂŠshĂŠ|yasabĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:yasabĂŠ|yasabĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yasabathath|yasabathath]] || [[word:yasabajaj|yasabajaj]] || [[word:yasabashash|yasabashash]] || [[word:yasab|yasab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yasabatha|yasabatha]] || [[word:yasabaja|yasabaja]] || [[word:yasabasha|yasabasha]] || [[word:yasaba|yasaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yasabafath|yasabafath]] || [[word:yasabafaj|yasabafaj]] || [[word:yasabafash|yasabafash]] || [[word:yasabaf|yasabaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:yasabasha|yasabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goyasabasha|goyasabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiyasabasha|gokiyasabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:yasabnĂŒsha|yasabnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goyasabnknĂŒsha|goyasabnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiyasabnĂŒsha|gokiyasabnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yasabshĂ«sha|yasabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyasabnkshĂ«sha|goyasabnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyasabshĂ«sha|gokiyasabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yasabrosha|yasabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyasabnkrosha|goyasabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyasabrosha|gokiyasabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yasabmusha|yasabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goyasabnkmusha|goyasabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyasabmusha|gokiyasabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:yasabsherasha|yasabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goyasabnksherasha|goyasabnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiyasabsherasha|gokiyasabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:yasabngasha|yasabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goyasabnkngasha|goyasabnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiyasabngasha|gokiyasabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yasabyasha|yasabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goyasabnkyasha|goyasabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiyasabyasha|gokiyasabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:yasabyamasha|yasabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goyasabnkyamasha|goyasabnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiyasabyamasha|gokiyasabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:yasabnĂŒshĂ«sha|yasabnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyasabnknĂŒshĂ«sha|goyasabnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyasabnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiyasabnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yasabnĂŒrosha|yasabnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyasabnknĂŒrosha|goyasabnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyasabnĂŒrosha|gokiyasabnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yasabnĂŒmusha|yasabnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyasabnknĂŒmusha|goyasabnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyasabnĂŒmusha|gokiyasabnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:yasabshĂ«nĂŒsha|yasabshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyasabnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|goyasabnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyasabshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiyasabshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yasabshĂ«rosha|yasabshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyasabnkshĂ«rosha|goyasabnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyasabshĂ«rosha|gokiyasabshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yasabshĂ«musha|yasabshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyasabnkshĂ«musha|goyasabnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyasabshĂ«musha|gokiyasabshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:yasabronĂŒsha|yasabronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyasabnkronĂŒsha|goyasabnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyasabronĂŒsha|gokiyasabronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:yasabroshĂ«sha|yasabroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyasabnkroshĂ«sha|goyasabnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyasabroshĂ«sha|gokiyasabroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yasabromusha|yasabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyasabnkromusha|goyasabnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyasabromusha|gokiyasabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:yasabmunĂŒsha|yasabmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyasabnkmunĂŒsha|goyasabnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyasabmunĂŒsha|gokiyasabmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:yasabmushĂ«sha|yasabmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyasabnkmushĂ«sha|goyasabnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyasabmushĂ«sha|gokiyasabmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yasabmurosha|yasabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyasabnkmurosha|goyasabnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyasabmurosha|gokiyasabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:yasab|yasab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:yĂŠsĂŠb|yĂŠsĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoyasab|hoyasab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoyĂŠsĂŠb|hoyĂŠsĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyasab|hohoyasab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyĂŠsĂŠb|hohoyĂŠsĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒyasab|nĂŒyasab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒyĂŠsĂŠb|nĂŒyĂŠsĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyasab|nĂŒnĂŒyasab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠsĂŠb|nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠsĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻyasab|nĂŻyasab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻyĂŠsĂŠb|nĂŻyĂŠsĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyasab|nĂŻnĂŻyasab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠsĂŠb|nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠsĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luyasab|luyasab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luyĂŠsĂŠb|luyĂŠsĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyasab|luluyasab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyĂŠsĂŠb|luluyĂŠsĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liyasab|liyasab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liyĂŠsĂŠb|liyĂŠsĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyasab|liliyasab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyĂŠsĂŠb|liliyĂŠsĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koyasab|koyasab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koyĂŠsĂŠb|koyĂŠsĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyasab|kokoyasab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyĂŠsĂŠb|kokoyĂŠsĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keyasab|keyasab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keyĂŠsĂŠb|keyĂŠsĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyasab|kekeyasab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyĂŠsĂŠb|kekeyĂŠsĂŠb]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
